parameters.name: file
parameters.label: File
parameters.description: The filesystem path and name of the file to load. Accepts files for regular text and files for text in table format.

parameters.name: converttable
parameters.label: Convert Text to Table
parameters.description: Converts the contents of the from regular text to table-formatted text (tab-delimited text, each <tab> is a new column in the table).

parameters.name: refresh
parameters.label: Refresh
parameters.description: Reload the file when this parameter is set to On.

parameters.name: refreshpulse
parameters.label: Refresh Pulse
parameters.description: Instantly reload the file from disk.

parameters.name: language
parameters.label: Language
parameters.description: Select how the decides which script language to operate on.

parameters.name: extension
parameters.label: Edit/View Extension
parameters.description: Select the file extension this should expose to external editors.

parameters.name: wordwrap
parameters.label: Word Wrap
parameters.description: Enable Word Wrap for Node Display.
